2603.16365.title: FactorEngine: A Program-level Knowledge-Infused Factor Mining Framework for Quantitative Investment
2603.16365.paper_summary: We study alpha factor mining, the automated discovery of predictive signals from noisy, non-stationary market data-under a practical requirement that mined factors be directly executable and auditable, and that the discovery process remain computationally tractable at scale. Existing symbolic approaches are limited by bounded expressiveness, while neural forecasters often trade interpretability for performance and remain vulnerable to regime shifts and overfitting. We introduce FactorEngine (FE), a program-level factor discovery framework that casts factors as Turing-complete code and improves both effectiveness and efficiency via three separations: (i) logic revision vs. parameter optimization, (ii) LLM-guided directional search vs. Bayesian hyperparameter search, and (iii) LLM usage vs. local computation. FE further incorporates a knowledge-infused bootstrapping module that transforms unstructured financial reports into executable factor programs through a closed-loop multi-agent extraction-verification-code-generation pipeline, and an experience knowledge base that supports trajectory-aware refinement (including learning from failures). Across extensive backtests on real-world OHLCV data, FE produces factors with substantially stronger predictive stability and portfolio impact-for example, higher IC/ICIR (and Rank IC/ICIR) and improved AR/Sharpe, than baseline methods, achieving state-of-the-art predictive and portfolio performance.
2603.16365.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究 alpha 因子挖掘，即從嘈雜的非平穩市場數據中自動發現預測信號——在一個實際需求下，挖掘的因子必須是可直接執行和可審計的，並且發現過程在規模上保持計算上的可行性。現有的符號方法受到表達能力的限制，而神經預測模型則常常為了性能而犧牲可解釋性，並且對於制度轉變和過擬合仍然脆弱。我們引入了 FactorEngine (FE)，這是一個程序級的因子發現框架，將因子視為圖靈完備的代碼，並通過三個分離來提高效果和效率：(i) 邏輯修訂與參數優化，(ii) LLM 引導的方向搜尋與貝葉斯超參數搜尋，以及 (iii) LLM 使用與本地計算。FE 進一步整合了一個知識注入的自舉模塊，通過一個閉環多代理提取-驗證-代碼生成管道，將非結構化的財務報告轉換為可執行的因子程序，並且還有一個經驗知識庫，支持基於軌跡的精細化（包括從失敗中學習）。在對現實世界 OHLCV 數據進行的廣泛回測中，FE 產生的因子具有顯著更強的預測穩定性和投資組合影響——例如，較高的 IC/ICIR（和 Rank IC/ICIR）以及改善的 AR/Sharpe，相較於基準方法，實現了最先進的預測和投資組合表現。
2603.16365.author: Qinhong Lin et.al.
2603.16365.authors: Qinhong Lin, Ruitao Feng, Yinglun Feng, Zhenxin Huang, Yukun Chen, Zhongliang Yang, Linna Zhou, Binjie Fei, Jiaqi Liu, Yu Li
